nasb.text: Then they took some of the fruit of the land in their hands and brought it down to us; and they brought us back a report and said, ‘It is a good land which the Lord our God is about to give us.’

esv.text: And they took in their hands some of the fruit of the land and brought it down to us, and brought us word again and said, ‘It is a good land that the Lord our God is giving us.’

cnv.text: 他們手裡拿著那地的果子，帶下來到我們這裡，並且向我們回報，說：‘耶和華我們的　神要賜給我們的地是美地。’

ccb.text: 他们带回来一些那里的果子，禀告说，‘我们的上帝耶和华赐给我们的地方很好。’
